description: Free & pay-per-call (x402/USDC) APIs for AI agents: nad.fun token intelligence and DeFi yield.
name: io.github.Coinlooter/mcp

environmentVariables.description: Private key of a dedicated payer wallet (Base, USDC) used to auto-pay x402 calls. Without it, only free tools work.
environmentVariables.name: X402_BUYER_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the nad.fun API (default https://nad.payflowagent.net).
environmentVariables.name: PAYFLOWAGENT_API_BASE

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Datafeed API (default https://data.payflowagent.net).
environmentVariables.name: PAYFLOWAGENT_DATAFEED_BASE

environmentVariables.description: Optional payment RPC endpoint (Base mainnet by default).
environmentVariables.name: X402_BUYER_RPC
